title: Forge
description: A production-grade, highly scalable fitness & nutrition AI-coaching platform designed for top-tier athlete tracking.
longDescription: Forge unifies AI automation with professional human coaching. It features an intelligent workout engine with PR tracking, a localized nutrition tracker with Indian/Global cuisines, an AI coach powered by Google GenAI, built-in gamification (XP, Levels, Streaks), secure body-tracking gallery via Cloudinary, and a multi-tenant coach/trainee architecture with an integrated blog CMS.

title: NexusPay
description: A production-grade, highly scalable financial wallet monorepo with secure P2P transactions and real-time balance management.
longDescription: Built a scalable digital wallet system as a Turborepo monorepo featuring user authentication, P2P money transfers with atomic database transactions, real-time balance tracking, and a user search/discovery system. Architected with separate frontend and backend apps sharing common packages.

title: Bugs Tracker
description: A collaborative bug tracking and issue management tool for development teams with real-time status workflows.
longDescription: Designed and developed a comprehensive bug tracking application enabling development teams to create, assign, and manage bug reports with priority levels, status transitions, and team collaboration features. Built with a robust typed architecture and modern UI patterns.

title: SyncBoard
description: A real-time collaborative whiteboard and drawing application with pencil tools, panning, and zooming capabilities.
longDescription: Built a collaborative drawing application with real-time synchronization. Features a real-time canvas with pencil drawing, shape creation, panning and zooming interactions. Architected as a Turborepo monorepo with separate frontend and backend applications sharing common packages.

title: Turborepo Boilerplate
description: A production-ready Turborepo starter template with two backend servers and one frontend, pre-configured for monorepo development.
longDescription: Created a reusable Turborepo boilerplate that initializes a monorepo with two backend services and one frontend application. Includes shared packages, optimized build pipelines, and workspace-managed dependencies for rapid project scaffolding.

title: Portfolio Website
description: This very portfolio — a dark-themed, animated developer showcase built with Next.js and Framer Motion.
longDescription: A modern portfolio featuring glassmorphism effects, scroll-triggered animations, bento grid layouts, border beam effects, and 3D floating crystals. Designed with a terminal-inspired aesthetic and responsive layouts.
